name: work-suite
description: The four-phase workflow primitive used by orchestrator agents: work-ideator (explore), work-planner (scope), work-doer (execute with TDD), work-merger (PR + merge) — plus autopilot (long-horizon loop discipline that activates when the operator hands a multi-track mandate). Vendor-neutral, engine-agnostic plugin bundle that mirrors the canonical skills under ouroboros-skills/skills/.
